Harness user health, lifestyle, fitness, and wellness data with one API. Transform passive user health & lifestyle insights into personalized user experiences that supercharge engagement, retention and revenue in your apps, with one integration. Create hyper-personalized customer journeys that leverage user health, lifestyle and behavioral data to maximize engagement.
